headline: Snap unit to use Qualcomm chips for upcoming AI smart glasses
summary: Specs, the Snap smart glasses unit formed early this year, will ‌use Qualcomm chips for its upcoming devices ‌under a multi-year deal announced on Friday, marking its first ​major move.  The deal builds on a years-long tie-up that has seen Qualcomm ⁠chips power multiple previous generations of Snap's developer-focused smart glasses called Spectacles.  Snap established its Specs unit ​in January ​to compete with Meta, ​whose Ray-Ban AI smart ‌glasses developed with EssilorLuxottica have become one of the few breakthrough successes in the race for AI-powered gadgets.

headline: Snap and Qualcomm Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Intelligent Computing Experiences on Specs
summary: SANTA MONICA, Calif. & SAN DIEGO, April 10, 2026--Today, Specs Inc., a Snap subsidiary, and Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. announced a multi-year strategic agreement to power future generations of Specs with Qualcomm Technologies’ industry-leading Snapdragon system-on-a-chip (SoC).

headline: Qualcomm Founder Honored As Investors Weigh Valuation And Profit Pressures
summary: Qualcomm co founder Dr. Irwin M. Jacobs has received the TechCon Fellows Lifetime Achievement Award. The award recognizes his foundational contributions in wireless technology and global cellular standards. The honor underscores Qualcomm's role in shaping modern wireless communications. For investors following NasdaqGS:QCOM, this recognition arrives while the company manages near term handset headwinds and a shifting revenue mix across chips, licensing, and adjacent markets. The award...
